blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 20 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 26 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
